projectDescription: MCP-first AI agent platform for adult content creators with self-hosted uncensored models, browser automation, and multi-platform management.
keyFeatures: MCP-first AI agent with 29 tools across Directus, Ollama, and Stagehand
Multi-platform content scraping with browser automation
AI-powered content classification using 6-concept taxonomy (3208 tags)
Media processing pipeline (watermarking, teaser generation, compression)
Human-in-the-loop login handling with browser extension
Self-hosted uncensored LLM models via Ollama
Action Runner system for pre-built AI workflows
publicApiSurface: POST /api/register - Public registration with invite validation
POST /api/genie/stream-chat - AI chat with content gating and RAG
POST /api/credentials/encrypt - Encrypt platform credentials (AES-256-GCM)
GET /api/credentials/decrypt/:id - Decrypt stored credentials
POST /api/queue/enqueue - Queue media processing jobs
GET /api/queue/stats - Get queue statistics
POST /api/captions/generate - Generate AI captions for media
GET /api/onboarding - Get onboarding state
PATCH /api/onboarding - Update onboarding progress
POST /api/admin/impersonate - Admin user impersonation
POST /api/rbac/sync - Directus to AnythingLLM user sync
GET /api/usage/:userId - Get user plan usage stats
MCP: list-collections - List all Directus collections
MCP: read-items - Query collection items with filters
MCP: trigger-flow - Execute Directus flows
MCP: start-session - Start Stagehand browser session
MCP: navigate - Navigate browser to URL
MCP: act - Perform browser actions
MCP: extract - Extract structured data from page
MCP: generate - Generate text with Ollama
MCP: chat - Chat with Ollama models
ACTION: scout-analyze - Scrape URL with AI analysis
ACTION: taxonomy-tag - Auto-classify content
ACTION: post-create - Draft platform-specific posts
ACTION: message-generate - Generate fan messages
ACTION: memory-recall - Search and summarize stored data
ACTION: media-process - Queue media operations
